name: ERNIE Image Turbo 1.0 (Exact)
note: [ERNIE-Image-Turbo](https://huggingface.co/baidu/ERNIE-Image-Turbo) is Baidu's Apache 2.0-licensed distilled release of ERNIE-Image, optimized with DMD and RL for fast generation. It keeps the same focus on instruction following, text rendering, and structured layouts, while targeting strong results with CFG 1 and 8 sampling steps.
